name: Creole Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve 2 beef bouillon cubes in 2 tablespoons boiling water.
2. In a large bowl, combine the following ingredients:
- 3/4 cup vegetable oil
- 3 tablespoons white wine vinegar
- 3 tablespoons chopped parsley
- 1 minced garlic clove
- 1/2 teaspoon crumbled basil
- 1/4 teaspoon crumbled thyme
- 1/4 teaspoon Tabasco sauce
3. Add 8 cups finely shredded cabbage and 1 1/2 cups finely chopped onions to the bowl.
4. Toss well to coat with dressing.
5. Serve with additional Tabasco if desired.
